_note: Stop hook auto-runs cost-track at session end so the cost-tracking namespace stays populated without users remembering to run `/cost-track` manually. TRACK_QUIET=1 suppresses the markdown summary (avoid spamming on every Stop). `|| true` ensures a track failure NEVER blocks session end — analytics data is best-effort, not load-bearing.
_platform_note: POSIX hooks (bash + node). Windows users continue to invoke `cost-track` manually via the slash command (the Stop hook silently no-ops on a non-bash shell).
